name: Thayer and Spring
address: 915 Silver Spring Ave, Silver Spring, MD 20910
bathroomsNote: Units offer 1 or 2 baths; no unit-specific bathroom count confirmed without floor plan
approxRentRange: $2,510 to $3,516/month (2BR, market rate; current promotion: up to one month free on 12-month lease signed by 7/15/26)

notes.doorman: 24/7 concierge confirmed on Brookfield Properties official listing; handles visitor coordination and package acceptance
notes.elevator: 11-story building, elevators confirmed present; multiple reviews note elevators are unreliable and frequently out of service
notes.balcony: Private patios or balconies in select units only, not standard across all apartments
notes.inUnitLaundry: In-home washer and dryer in all units per RentCafe listing
notes.petFriendly: Up to two pets, cats and dogs, no weight limit; breed restrictions apply (13 restricted breeds); on-site pet spa
notes.packageRoom: Secured package lockers plus concierge package acceptance
notes.unitClimate: Air conditioning listed as in-unit feature across multiple sources; specific control type (unit thermostat vs building-controlled) not stated explicitly, but in-unit listing convention implies resident control
notes.has2BRor1BRDen: 2BR units confirmed; no 1BR+den floor plan mentioned in any source ('Yes' reflects 2BR availability only)
notes.wellMaintained: Mixed signals: common areas described as clean by some residents, 3.5/5 rating on RentCafe (277 reviews), but elevator breakdowns cited in multiple reviews; managed by Brookfield Properties (large institutional operator)
notes.buildingDetails: Built 2019; 11 stories; 399 units; studios, 1BR, 2BR, and townhomes; Brookfield Properties management; MPDU and workforce housing units available alongside market rate
